task.title: Copying a remote file within one subproject

titlealts.navtitle: Copying a remote file within one subproject

task.shortdesc: Follow these steps to copy a partitioned data set member or sequential data set.

taskbody.prereq: You must connect to the remote MVS system.

step.cmd: Select the partitioned data set member or sequential data set you want to copy.
Right-click the member or data set.
Within the same subproject, locate and select the destination container (partitioned data set or subproject) you want to copy to.

step.stepresult: You are requested to enter a new name for the partitioned data set member or data set.
The new member or data set is created in the new destination.
